title: Chapter 186 – Bond
content:
Taoist Cheon Ju had once declared that his deep internal injury put him on equal footing with Jeong Yeon-shin. A remark about the Radiant Demon Wing Leader, made after only four exchanges.

No longer.

The boy had grown stronger. He still fell short of a fully restored Taoist Cheon Ju.

Yet duels between warriors were governed by innumerable variables. At this moment, the outcome belonged unmistakably to the Radiant Demon Wing Leader.

Hoo.

Jeong Yeon-shin drew a long, steady breath. In his mind, he traced the contours of his newly devised sword technique.

A few breaths were all he needed. Time enough to arrange the third sword technique — the only one he had given a name.

His muscles, swollen from the intensity of combat, pulsed in a slow, measured rhythm.

The breeze brushing his bare skin felt sharper than the stinging sword wounds. Quite refreshing.

'I've created three sword techniques.'

The boy recalled three trajectories. Thoughts flickering through his mind like fleeting beams of light.

The First Technique was a swift-assault sword style, inspired by the Azure Qilin's Emperor's Sword Form. It amplified full-body energy emission to envelop every direction at once.

An energy wave that bolstered sword energy. A broad downward slash transformed into a lightning-fast strike.

It allowed him to strike first despite moving second — designed to reach the enemy before they could reach him.

The Second Technique stemmed from the Swimming Heaven Sword Ghost, Baek Seo-gun.

A counterattack sword style.

Forged by studying her sword-like physique. Her body alone justified the renown of a Sword Venerable.

It harnessed the energy waves accumulated across countless clashes.

From the triceps to the extensor digitorum beneath the thumb, each muscle was tuned through the Jeong Family Dynamic Technique.

Fine, precise movements stored energy.

Converging the energy waves amassed from battling a formidable opponent into his right hand surpassed the First Technique's strike by a wide margin.

'The Azure Flame Slash is different.'

The Third Technique.

A single lethal sword technique. It condensed every principle of the Radiant Sword Style into one trajectory. Even muscles tempered by the Jeong Family Dynamic Technique would melt from a single swing.

A trajectory that drew out the utmost sword energy. One slash stimulated his entire body to this degree.

In time, it might further refine his still-lengthening limbs.

All three techniques were specialized to harness the Luminous Wheel Technique. Even though these techniques were domineering — unlike the auspicious energy — this held true.

Martial arts befitting Desolate Fortress's Radiant Demon Wing Leader.

He had no interest in the mind-body cultivation of the Nine Sects. These were sword techniques crafted solely to crush and defeat his enemies.

With three sword techniques, it could rightly be called a sword style.

In this moment, the boy became a black-rank swordmaster. A Desolate Fortress leader debating the martial world with a single blade.

"A sword technique name with a story? Quite resolute. If this poor Taoist offered such a favor, people would come bearing sacks of rice by the bushel."

Taoist Cheon Ju's voice carried a hint of amusement. "Poor Taoist" was how he referred to himself — a humble term monks and priests used to signify modesty.

Perhaps it was the effect of their sword exchange. The Sword Saint's tone had grown gentler. As Ma Jin was to Jeong Yeon-shin, Taoist Cheon Ju was Yu Hyeon's uncle-master.

By those bonds, the Sword Saint was something like the boy's uncle, too. He seemed to feel a unique sentiment.

"I was deeply shaken. In all my years, few moments have astonished me as much as today."

He had been present when the third technique of the Eternal Blossom Fist was devised.

Blossoming Fist — a fist technique born from Yu Hyeon's Falling Petal Palm Technique. Back then, the boy who now wore black robes had still been dressed in white.

As the Radiant Demon Wing Leader, he had matched Mount Hua's Sword Saint in swordplay. The moment he had shared palm techniques with Yu Hyeon paled in comparison.

Though the martial world brimmed with marvels — elixirs, spirit creatures, and the like — this too was extraordinary.

Jeong Yeon-shin slowly opened his eyes. Mount Hua's refined Taoist filled his view.

The sharp-featured, middle-aged swordmaster smiled softly.

"This poor Taoist has lost. I accept defeat."

"My thanks to the Sword Saint. I gained much from this."

"'Gained much' feels awkward. The martial world is a mysterious place indeed. That boy from before, now discussing swords with this poor Taoist. Not even fully grown..."

Taoist Cheon Ju spoke.

Unspoken amazement tinged his voice — pitched higher than during their first meeting.

True to his own claim of astonishment. Even Mount Hua's seasoned supreme swordmaster could not hide his awe.

The sharpness he had shown upon first seeing the boy with Yu Hyeon had softened considerably.

"I'm far from the Sword Saint's level."

He wondered who had inflicted Taoist Cheon Ju's internal injury.

A fully intact Sword Saint had rivaled the previous Radiant Demon Wing Leader.

Considering Ma Jin's Harbinger of Death renown, encountering a worthy opponent while roaming the martial world was a rare thing.

In most regions, he would reign invincible. Given the martial world's breadth, countless lesser foes sprawled beneath him.

Taoist Cheon Ju merely smiled.

"The Radiant Demon Wing Leader jests with a Taoist. Didn't this poor Taoist lose? Truly a refined sword technique."

"I broadened my horizons with Mount Hua's sword."

"Polite words. With much left unsaid, I'll visit your residence soon with Yu Hyeon. There's something urgent I must discuss — not with the Radiant Demon Wing Leader, but with Jeong Yeon-shin. What I've experienced ties directly to you."

Likely the cause of his internal injury.

A matter linked to Jeong Yeon-shin rather than the Radiant Demon Wing Leader implied personal ties. What could have led a Nine Sects supreme master like the Sword Saint to this state?

"...I'll prepare and await you."

The boy raised a clasped-fist salute. Taoist Cheon Ju returned it, palm over fist.

The Radiant Demon Wing Leader's demeanor here was markedly different from before. Did he truly honor the Nine Sects to this extent?

Unlike his treatment of prestigious family masters, his respect was striking — a stark contrast. Even bare-chested, he exuded dignity.

The crowd in the stands fell momentarily entranced.

The young Radiant Demon Wing Leader's presence was captivating.

A wildness breathed from his rarely bared torso. Utterly mesmerizing.

Even after an improbable victory, he remained aloof. An overwhelming air lingered about him.

Even the blood pooling along the cuts on his abdomen carried that weight. The pristine black trousers, in contrast to his bare torso, lent him an odd mystique.

***

The vast crowd broke their silence. One by one, voices rose.

"...Like a figure stepped out of a painting. I couldn't follow any of the duel, but it must have been moonlit swordplay. Alongside Mount Hua's Sword Saint, he belongs to the martial world's upper echelon. Another realm entirely."

"Not quite human, is he...?"

"The Radiant Demon Wing Leader won! Should've bet my fortune, not pennies!"

"I lost everything."

"That boy... beat Mount Hua's immortal..."

The rising fervor heated the air. Awe turned to cheers. Vibrations from their throats echoed in every direction.

Waaaaa — !

The roar was deafening. Despite so few grasping the supreme masters' moves, it resounded.

Stronger than the noise of clashing energy waves, it struck the ears.

The martial world was a realm of monstrous marvels.

They had witnessed a famed master in action, seen him bared to the skin. A sight to stir the heroic spirit.

Beings from an otherworldly realm had given their all before them.

That a young master had defeated Mount Hua's mid-tier supreme master fueled the cheers further. An inevitable thrill.

The martial world welcomed a new titan.

His name: Jeong Yeon-shin, the Radiant Demon Wing Leader.

"May Desolate Fortress safeguard the people! Such prowess at that age! Only Desolate Fortress can ensure the martial world's stability! A bearing worthy of a major faction!"

"Look this way, just once! I admire you!"

"Clear Cloud Martial School! Please visit Clear Cloud Martial School! We seek your guidance, Radiant Demon Wing Leader!"

Some overly excited voices shouted above the rest. Tremendous heat.

As if the Opening Tournament were already conquered, the air buzzed with anticipation. People poured out their words.

A world starved for entertainment.

In this moment, the Radiant Demon Wing Leader and Mount Hua's Sword Saint stood at the very heart of their martial world.

Only the dozen or so masters in the Alliance's stands reacted differently. Words slipped out sparingly amid their silence.

They could not afford to be rash. The leadership canopy, blown away by the duel, sat in quiet subsidence.

"He broke Plum Fragrance Drifting Blossoms. A sword technique I've never seen in all my life. A highly dangerous boy. There's no telling how far he'll grow."

The Zhuge Family Head spoke, and other voices followed. Prestigious family elders chimed in.

"He devised a sword technique...? The Sword Saint's words don't sound false."

"Did you see that sword technique clearly?"

"I couldn't fully catch it. The Sword Saint's energy wave was too dazzling."

"The Great Rejuvenation Pill's fate hangs in the balance."

"Where's the Yan Family's First Fist? Shouldn't she be scrutinizing Jeong Yeon-shin's martial arts most keenly right now?"

"Probably sprawled in some tavern. No surprise. Does anyone still expect diligence from that heroine?"

"She's been like that since her youth. Reckless yet brilliant. Her drunken fist techniques were astonishingly profound."

Faint laughter rippled among the elders — seemingly forced, an attempt to deflect the dire situation.

"I recall it vividly, too. Her martial skill was so extraordinary it made her conduct impossible to fault. Many secretly admired her, so nitpicking was tough. Had my rank been half lower, I might've challenged her regardless of face. No, wait — then I'd have lost for certain."

"No guessing how much her prowess has matured."

"Let's head back. The Grand Internal Strategist has begun her work. Truly brimming with intellect."

"At this point, isn't it worth seeking peace with Desolate Fortress, at least outwardly? Broadening our options would be wise. Did you order this, Zhuge Family Head?"

Swish.

The Zhuge Family Head unfolded a white crane-embroidered fan and shook his head, lightly covering his mouth with its edge.

"Likely Lady Ye's improvisation. She rose before the final sword techniques clashed. Innate wit and quick thinking. If only my son had learned half of it."

"You're the only one who finds Fan Dragon lacking. If she's that impressive, why not wed him to the Grand Internal Strategist?"

The Murong Family Head asked, amused. The Zhuge Family Head's lips curved.

"That's for the Ye Family Head to decide. Our family sent matchmakers long ago."

"...I'll leave it to my niece's will."

The seated Ye Family Head replied gruffly. The Murong Family Head's angular face tilted slightly.

"Didn't the Ye Family once rise through strategic marriages? I hear they used many ploys to expand their trade. Aren't your collateral kin spread across the Central Plains? Are you wary of the Zhuge Family?"

"I just cherish my niece especially."

"Ah, I forgot you've no children. My oversight — apologies. The Grand Internal Strategist must feel like a daughter to you."

"Spot on."

"Then the Zhuge Family can't send ordinary gifts. Fan Dragon Zhuge Xian is lacking nowhere."

The Murong Family Head said with a smirk.

The Zhuge Family Head, fan now folded, offered a faint smile. His true intent was impossible to read.

Around that time, an unusual scene unfolded on the sparring stage.

As Jeong Yeon-shin and Taoist Cheon Ju turned, conversing quietly.

From one side, white robes fluttered. A woman with swift movements stepped onto the stage.

Rustle.

Lady Ye, the treasured daughter of the Ye Clan, approached clutching a plain cloth.

Her long legs bore the subtleties of a stepping technique. A faint energy wave rippled from her feet like vapor.

Like a fairy descending. Sunlight danced across her long black hair below her shoulders. Even her eyes, veiled behind white cloth, held a certain mystique.

The crowd gasped at her aura — distinct from the Radiant Demon Wing Leader's.

The two supreme masters' dialogue paused.

The boy silently watched the woman as she approached.

"I caught it with my own eyes, didn't I?"

Lady Ye said. She drew quite close. The gentle energy in her slender breath was palpable.

Her hand, holding the white cloth, touched Jeong Yeon-shin's abdomen. The boy, staring, flinched.

Her lips curved smoothly.

"You've got to continue the next duel, right? I'm the Grand Internal Strategist. You're the most esteemed guest among the envoys."

"No need..."

"It's courtesy befitting your rank. You must uphold your dignity, too. You're the only one, aren't you?"
